name: TIS Pilot Intake (Webhook → Validate → Drive → Respond)

parameters.jsCode: const ctx=$items('Build Drive Context')[0]?.json; const items=$input.all().map(i=>i.json); const err=items.find(j=>j&&j.error); if(err) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Drive Command-Center search failed',details:JSON.stringify(err),error_http_code:502}}]; const found=items.filter(j=>j&&typeof j.id==='string'&&j.id&&j.name===ctx.command_center_folder_name); if(found.length!==1) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Command-Center folder missing or duplicated',details:JSON.stringify({count:found.length,ids:found.map(f=>f.id)}),error_http_code:502}}]; return [{json:{status:'pass',command_center_folder_id:found[0].id}}];

const ctx=$items('Build Drive Context')[0]?.json; const items=$input.all().map(i=>i.json); const err=items.find(j=>j&&j.error); if(err) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Drive Accepted-Intake search failed',details:JSON.stringify(err),error_http_code:502}}]; const found=items.filter(j=>j&&typeof j.id==='string'&&j.id&&j.name===ctx.accepted_intake_folder_name); if(found.length!==1) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Accepted-Intake folder missing or duplicated',details:JSON.stringify({count:found.length,ids:found.map(f=>f.id)}),error_http_code:502}}]; return [{json:{status:'pass',accepted_intake_folder_id:found[0].id}}];

const created=$json; if(created&&created.error) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Failed to create job folder',details:JSON.stringify({message:created.error.message,name:created.error.name}),error_http_code:502}}]; if(!created||typeof created.id!=='string'||!created.id) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Drive did not return job folder id',details:'',error_http_code:502}}]; return [{json:{status:'pass',job_folder_id:created.id}}];

const created=$json; if(created&&created.error) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Drive intake.json write failed',details:JSON.stringify({message:created.error.message,name:created.error.name}),error_http_code:502}}]; if(!created||typeof created.id!=='string'||!created.id) return [{json:{status:'error',error_type:'drive_failed',message:'Drive did not return intake file id',details:'',error_http_code:502}}]; return [{json:{status:'pass',intake_file_id:created.id}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'error', error_type: $json.error_type || 'unknown_error', message: $json.message || 'An error occurred', details: $json.details || '' } }}

={{ (() => { const base = $items('Validate Intake')[0].json.response || { status: 'accepted', message: 'Pilot intake validated' }; return { ...base, drive: { job_folder_id: $items('Job Folder Result')[0].json.job_folder_id, intake_file_id: $json.intake_file_id } }; })() }}

meta.notes: Writes accepted intake to Drive under /TVG-System/Command-Center/Accepted-Intake/<job-id>/intake.json
